phrases.en: Dan meets his friends at the karaoke bar.
phrases.zh: 丹在卡拉OK酒吧和朋友们碰面。

phrases.en: They book a small private room for the night.
phrases.zh: 他们订了一间小包间，唱一整晚。

phrases.en: A waiter shows them to their room.
phrases.zh: 一名服务员把他们带到包间。

phrases.en: Dan picks up the heavy songbook.
He browses the songs on the touch screen.
phrases.zh: 他在触摸屏上浏览歌曲。

phrases.en: Everyone adds their favorite songs to the list.
phrases.zh: 每个人把自己喜欢的歌加进列表。

phrases.en: He sings loudly while the words show on the screen.
phrases.zh: 歌词显示在屏幕上，他大声地唱。

phrases.en: His friends clap and cheer for him.
Then, they take turns at the microphone.
phrases.zh: 然后，他们轮流拿麦克风唱。

phrases.en: Sometimes, two friends sing a duet together.
phrases.zh: 有时，两个朋友一起合唱二重唱。

phrases.en: Everyone sings along to the popular songs.
phrases.zh: 大家跟着熟悉的流行歌一起唱。

phrases.en: Dan orders cold drinks and snacks for the group.
phrases.zh: 丹为大家点了冷饮和小吃。

phrases.en: Finally, they laugh and sing until late at night.
phrases.zh: 最后，他们又笑又唱，直到深夜。
